lines.speaker: Oldak
lines.text: Where do you want a sphere to?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Dorgesh-Kaan.

lines.speaker: Oldak
lines.text: You'll need to get me two law runes and a piece of molten glass.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll have to go and get some then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have the right materials here!

lines.speaker: Oldak
lines.text: Excellent! Now, just a minute...

lines.speaker: Oldak
lines.text: You're quite welcome! Now, where was I...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have [X] law runes and [X] pieces of molten glass here!

lines.speaker: Oldak
lines.text: Excellent! I can make you [X] moving-over-distance spheres with them! How many do you want?

lines.speaker: Oldak
lines.text: Excellent! Now, just a minute...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nowhere.

lines.speaker: Oldak
lines.text: Hmm...

lines.speaker: Oldak
lines.text: I wonder...

lines.speaker: Oldak
lines.text: That's funny...

lines.speaker: Oldak
lines.text: What if I...

lines.speaker: Oldak
lines.text: No, that's not right...

lines.speaker: Oldak
lines.text: But that means...

lines.speaker: Oldak
lines.text: Aha!

lines.speaker: Oldak
lines.text: Ah! I was wrong about it all along!

lines.speaker: Oldak
lines.text: I wonder what happens if...

lines.speaker: Oldak
lines.text: Oh, hello! I was just trying to discover the properties of these magical stones you call 'runes', and trying to make some devices to harness their power.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What have you discovered?

lines.speaker: Oldak
lines.text: Oh, it's terribly exciting! Let me explain...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, I see!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, I see!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh... How interesting.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What have you made?

lines.speaker: Oldak
lines.text: The only thing I've been able to make so far is this. I call it the moving-over-distance sphere.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is it?

lines.speaker: Oldak
lines.text: Well, I was experimenting with these blue runes, the ones you call 'law' runes. They have a strange property of being able to move instantly from one place to another.

lines.speaker: Oldak
lines.text: I know; I couldn't believe it either!

lines.speaker: Oldak
lines.text: I found that whenever I prepared powdered law runes in a certain way and then threw them on the ground, I would appear somewhere else in the city.

lines.speaker: Oldak
lines.text: I asked Zanik to test it, and she said that wherever she was in the caves, even if she went to the surface, whenever she smashed the sphere on the ground she would appear back in the city!

lines.speaker: Oldak
lines.text: I can see how it might be useful, but I wish I knew more about how it worked...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I buy one?

lines.speaker: Oldak
lines.text: Oh, I can make one for you if you like. You'll need to give me two law runes and a piece of molten glass.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll have to go and get some then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye!

lines.speaker: Oldak
lines.text: Oh, er, goodbye. Now, where was I...
